articles.title: Banking groups escalate fight over stablecoin yield ahead of Senate vote
articles.description: The American Bankers Association amplified warnings the Senate’s Clarity Act could push deposit flight into stablecoins unless lawmakers tighten yield limits.

articles.title: Corpay taps BVNK to bring stablecoin wallets to corporate payments
articles.description: Corpay will use stablecoin rails in its treasury operations to improve capital efficiency, reduce reliance on pre-funded accounts, and move funds across its global footprint.

articles.title: Crypto and AI could be dirty words on 2026 midterm campaign trail
articles.description: Voter attitudes toward the AI and crypto industries aren’t favorable in the US, and a spotlight on how much they’re spending could further alienate them ahead of the 2026 midterms.

articles.title: The biggest consensus overhaul in Solana history is officially live for testing
articles.description: The upgrade, known as Alpenglow, is live on a community test cluster, said Solana core developer Anza.

articles.title: 質量決定命運，新研究發現星團大小左右行星能否順利形成
articles.description: 天文學家利用詹姆斯·韋伯太空望遠鏡，結合哈伯太空望遠鏡，深入觀測四個鄰近星系中數千個年輕星團，研究它們在不同演 […]

articles.title: Augustus gets conditional OCC approval for AI and stablecoin bank
articles.description: Peter Thiel-backed Augustus has won conditional OCC approval for a US bank charter focused on AI-driven payments and stablecoin settlement infrastructure.

articles.title: Strategy resumes Bitcoin acquisitions with $43M BTC buy
articles.description: Strategy added $43 million in Bitcoin last week after Michael Saylor drew mixed investor reactions for signaling potential BTC sales to fund dividend payments.

articles.title: Ripple raises $200 million from Neuberger Berman to expand its Ripple Prime platform
articles.description: Ripple announced its agreement with the global investment firm Monday, noting that Ripple Prime’s revenue has tripled in the last year, when. it acquired it for $1.25 billion.

articles.title: DAPPOS launches xBubble: An AI agent that learns and uses AI for you
articles.description: xBubble allows users to complete specific tasks with simpler prompts by automatically building and dispatching task-specific AI agents.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI surges 25% over weekend
articles.description: Cronos (CRO), up 9.7% from Friday, joined Sui (SUI) as a top performer.

articles.title: USDC issuer Circle raises $222M in Arc token presale valued at $3B
articles.description: Circle raised $222 million in an ARC token presale led by a16z Crypto as Q1 revenue hit $694 million and USDC circulation climbed to $77 billion.

articles.title: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers. Cowboy Space raised $275 million to build them.
articles.description: Cowboy Space Corporation wants to put data centers in orbit. First, it has to build the rockets to get them there.

articles.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slows down ether purchases after already buying 1 million tokens this year
articles.description: The firm bought roughly 26,000 ether last week, a sharp decline from the average of the previous weeks' 100,000.

articles.title: XRP metrics line up bull signals for ‘full-scale rally’ to $2
articles.description: XRP is giving hints that a price breakout may be underway, based on several technical and onchain indicators, with bulls eyeing $2 as the first stop.

articles.title: Strategy buys 535 bitcoin for $43 million days after signaling potential BTC sales
articles.description: Last week's purchases were funded by sales of the company's common stock.

articles.title: Ronin set to transition to Ethereum layer 2 from independent sidechain
articles.description: The purpose behind the migration is to enhance security, tokenomics and scalability, said Ronin, which suffered the largest DeFi bridge exploit on record in 2022.

articles.title: Crypto funds log $858M in sixth straight week of inflows: CoinShares
articles.description: Crypto ETPs drew $858 million in inflows last week, led by Bitcoin with $706 million, as sentiment improved and short-BTC funds saw $14 million of outflows.

articles.title: Bitcoin funds capture $700 million as institutions place their bets
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for May 11, 2026

articles.title: BTC price target becomes $85K next: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
articles.description: Bitcoin faced a choice between consolidation and new local highs as $80,000 support held despite flash BTC price volatility and liquidity grabs.
